entity.summary: Canada-based cryptocurrency trading platform founded in 2014, now operated through Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd., a CIRO-regulated investment dealer and alternative trading system with documented Ontario enforcement history.
entity.notes: Official company history establishes the 2014 founding year. The Ontario Securities Commission approved a July 2020 settlement concerning wash trading and misleading statements. Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd. became an IIROC member and registered investment dealer on October 12, 2022; IIROC is now CIRO.

expected.summary: Canada-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Coinsquare brand.

changes.summary: Canada-based cryptocurrency trading platform founded in 2014, now operated through Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd., a CIRO-regulated investment dealer and alternative trading system with documented Ontario enforcement history.
changes.notes: Official company history establishes the 2014 founding year. The Ontario Securities Commission approved a July 2020 settlement concerning wash trading and misleading statements. Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd. became an IIROC member and registered investment dealer on October 12, 2022; IIROC is now CIRO.

events.title: Coinsquare was founded in Canada in 2014
events.description: Coinsquare was founded in Canada in 2014 as a cryptocurrency trading platform serving Canadian users.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: OSC approved a settlement over Coinsquare wash trading and misleading statements
events.description: The Ontario Securities Commission approved a settlement addressing inflated trading volumes generated through wash trades, misleading public statements, and related conduct by Coinsquare and former executives.
events.notes: The settlement imposed financial and governance consequences but did not establish a terminal shutdown of the platform.

events.title: Coinsquare became an IIROC investment dealer member
events.description: Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd. was admitted to IIROC membership and registered as an investment dealer, establishing a regulated Canadian operating framework for the platform.
events.notes: IIROC subsequently became part of the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization. Registration does not constitute approval of individual crypto assets.

evidence.title: About Coinsquare
evidence.notes: Official company history states that Coinsquare was founded in 2014.

evidence.title: Coinsquare announces acquisition of CoinSmart
evidence.notes: Official transaction announcement independently describes Coinsquare as founded in 2014 and incorporated in Canada.

evidence.title: Coinsquare settlement order
evidence.notes: OSC bulletin records the July 21, 2020 hearing, settlement terms, costs, and sanctions.

evidence.title: Coinsquare settlement agreement and enforcement record
evidence.notes: Official OSC bulletin describes the platform, wash trading, misleading statements, and agreed settlement facts.

evidence.title: Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd. admitted to IIROC membership
evidence.notes: Regulator notice records admission to IIROC membership effective October 12, 2022.

evidence.title: Coinsquare becomes an investment dealer and IIROC member
evidence.notes: Official company announcement corroborates the investment-dealer registration and IIROC membership milestone.

evidence.title: CIRO dealer profile for Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd.
evidence.notes: Current CIRO dealer directory verifies Coinsquare Capital Markets Ltd. as an investment dealer.
